title: Senior Commercial Data Analyst (f/m/d)
matched_skills: Dashboard building — Power BI (PL-300 certified), Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
Customer Success / commercial exposure (Hapag-Lloyd customer experience, ECE commercial analytics)
Retention/cohort analysis — cohort analysis and retention signals in e-commerce and Hapag-Lloyd work
missing_skills: SQL proficiency — not mentioned in CV (non-negotiable per JD)
B2B SaaS environment — background covers FinTech, shipping, manufacturing, IoT but no SaaS-native experience
NRR / churn / health score modelling in SaaS context
key_requirements: Proven data analysis/BI experience in B2B SaaS environment
Retention modelling, renewal forecasting, OKR tracking
cv_highlights: Power BI Microsoft Certified (PL-300), Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
HSBC: USD 8M programme dashboards, spend attribution, burn-rate reporting to C-suite
Hapag-Lloyd: customer journey & behavioural analysis, friction identification, sprint reporting
ECE Group: commercial analytics for business development pipeline
Cohort analysis, customer segmentation, A/B testing experience
gaps: SQL not mentioned anywhere in CV — critical gap for this role
No Salesforce or CS tool experience mentioned
recommendation: Good match on BI tools and commercial analytics mindset. SQL gap is the main risk — must be addressed in CV if candidate has any SQL experience. Reframe Hapag-Lloyd customer journey work as CS-adjacent analytics. Strong dashboard credentials from Power BI certification.
